narrative: skills/dashboard has SKILL.md and four Python entry points (render, snapshot, narrate, html) but no verify.py. The dashboard claims to be 0.1 deterministic with no LLM in renders; without a verify.py, that claim is asserted by prose, not checked by walker. Closure: a per-file structural+import check that exits 0 iff each entry point is present, parses, and imports nothing from the LLM-SDK or nondeterminism denylists.
